pier.git.merge.description: Select a branch and merge it into the current branch.
pier.git.merge.title: Git: Merge Branch...

pier.git.switchBranch.description: Select a local branch and switch the current worktree to it.
pier.git.switchBranch.title: Git: Switch Branch...

pier.git.stashApply.description: Select a stash and apply it while keeping it in the stash list.
pier.git.stashApply.title: Git: Apply Stash...

pier.git.stashDrop.description: Select a stash and delete it from the stash list.
pier.git.stashDrop.title: Git: Drop Stash...

pier.git.stashIncludeUntracked.description: Stash local changes, including untracked files.
pier.git.stashIncludeUntracked.title: Git: Stash (Include Untracked)

pier.git.stashPop.description: Select a stash, apply it, and remove it from the stash list.
pier.git.stashPop.title: Git: Pop Stash...

pier.git.rebase.description: Select a branch and rebase the current branch onto it.
pier.git.rebase.title: Git: Rebase Branch...

pier.git.undoLastCommit.description: Undo the last commit while preserving its changes as staged.
pier.git.undoLastCommit.title: Git: Undo Last Commit

pier.worktree.create.description: Creates a Git worktree under the repository-managed worktrees directory.
pier.worktree.create.title: Create Worktree

pier.worktree.delete.description: Selects and removes a Git worktree.
pier.worktree.delete.title: Delete Worktrees...

pier.worktree.list.description: Lists Git worktrees for the current repository and opens the selected worktree.
pier.worktree.list.title: List Worktrees

description: Built-in git command palette and terminal status support.

messages.ui.createUnavailable: Worktree creation is not available yet
messages.ui.deleteUnavailable: Worktree deletion is not available yet
messages.ui.gitUnsupported: Current directory is not a Git repository
messages.ui.changes.selectFile: Select a file to preview its changes
messages.ui.panelHint.gitChangesClean: No changes in the working tree
messages.ui.branchGraphCaveatTitle: Commit graph counts only. Squash or rebase merges may show already-applied commits as branch-only.
messages.ui.branchTipTreeInHistoryTitle: Branch tip tree matches {{commit}} in the current history; current branch has {{count}} newer commit(s).
messages.ui.gitLoadingStashApply: Applying stash (keeping it in the list)...
messages.ui.gitSwitchSelectBranch: Select a branch to switch to
messages.ui.gitMergeSelectBranch: Select a branch to merge into the current branch
messages.ui.gitRebaseSelectBranch: Select a branch to rebase onto
messages.ui.gitMergeAlreadyUpToDate: Branch {{branch}} has no new commits to merge.
messages.ui.gitMergeConflictBody: Merge resulted in {{count}} conflict(s) that need to be resolved.
messages.ui.gitStashConflictBody: Stash was applied but resulted in conflicts that need to be resolved.
messages.ui.gitRebaseAlreadyUpToDate: Current branch is already up to date with {{branch}}.
messages.ui.gitRebaseConflict: Rebase paused due to conflicts. Resolve them, then continue.
messages.ui.gitRebaseContinueConflict: Rebase still has conflicts. Resolve them, then continue.
messages.ui.gitUndoCommitConfirm: Undo the last commit? Changes will be preserved as staged.
messages.ui.gitUndoCommitSuccess: Last commit undone (changes preserved as staged)
messages.ui.title: Worktrees
messages.ui.unsupported: Current directory does not support Git worktrees
messages.ui.worktreeUnavailable.notGitRepository: The current directory is not a Git repository
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.description: Create an isolated worktree for this task
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.errorAgentRequired: Choose an agent to start the task
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.errorBranchInvalid: Branch names may only contain letters, digits and . _ / -
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.generateFailed.invalid: AI returned no usable branch name, try again
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.generateFailed.timeout: Agent timed out, try again or switch to manual naming
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.taskHint: Smart generation uses the task description and current project context to generate a branch name and create an isolated worktree under {{root}}.
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.taskPlaceholder: Example: fix the settings divider alignment
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.startTaskHint: Open a new agent conversation in the created worktree.
messages.ui.worktreeCreate.title: New Worktree

pier.git.changes.description: Placeholder panel for upcoming git change preview.
pier.git.changes.title: Git Changes

pier.git.statusItem.showDirtyIndicator.label: Show dirty indicator
pier.git.statusItem.showDirtyIndicator.description: Show working tree change counts and line delta in the worktree status item.

pier.git.worktree.branchNamePrompt.label: Worktree branch prompt
pier.git.worktree.branchNamePrompt.description: Optional. Leave blank for the default template. {{task}} becomes the task description; {{projectRootPath}} becomes the project root path.
pier.git.worktree.branchNamePrompt.placeholder: Generate a short branch name for {{task}}. Follow rules in {{projectRootPath}}. Output only the branch name.

pier.worktree.status.description: Shows the current Git worktree in terminal panels.
pier.worktree.status.title: Worktree Status

name: Git
